mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk_change_log ( id, knowledge_id, operation_type, before_data, after_data, remark, operator, gmt_create ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{knowledgeId}, #{operationType}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{remark}, #{operator}, #{gmtCreate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, knowledge_id AS knowledgeId, operation_type AS operationType, before_data AS beforeData, after_data AS afterData, remark AS remark, operator AS operator, gmt_create AS gmtCreate FROM knowledge_chunk_change_log WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id AS id, knowledge_id AS knowledgeId, operation_type AS operationType, before_data AS beforeData, after_data AS afterData, remark AS remark, operator AS operator, gmt_create AS gmtCreate FROM knowledge_chunk_change_log WHERE id = #{id}
